title: GlotOCR-Bench
desc: A comprehensive benchmark evaluating OCR generalization across 158 Unicode scripts, including many Iranian scripts. Reveals stark performance gaps on low-resource writing systems.

title: GlotSID
desc: Script and language identification covering 1,600+ languages including over 40 Iranian varieties. Enables automatic detection of Iranian language text in multilingual corpora.

title: GlotScript
desc: A resource and tool for script identification covering virtually all writing systems used in Iranian languages — from Arabic-Nastaliq to Avestan, Sogdian, and Cuneiform.

title: GlotLID
desc: Language identification model covering 1,600+ languages with strong coverage of Iranian language varieties including many low-resource and endangered ones.

title: GlotCC
desc: An open broad-coverage common crawl corpus with high-quality data for 1,000+ languages. Provides the first large-scale text for dozens of Iranian minority languages.

title: Transliteration Tools
desc: Transliteration tools and resources for converting Iranian language text between scripts — enabling Persian↔Latin, Kurdish Arabic↔Latin, and cross-script transfer learning.
